measure.CatchLine: Modifies definition of "child-caring agency" to include certain residential facilities.
measure.MeasureSummary: Modifies definition of "child-caring agency" to include certain residential facilities.
measure.RelatingToFull: Relating to child caring agencies that provide developmental disability services to children; amending ORS 418.205, 418.257, 418.258 and 418.259.
measure.RelatingTo: Relating to child caring agencies that provide developmental disability services to children.
measure.AtTheRequestOf: (at the request of Senate Interim Committee on Human Services)
measure.FiscalImpact: May have fiscal impact, but no statement yet issued
measure.RevenueImpact: May have revenue impact, but no statement yet issued

sponsors.PresessionFiledMessage: Printed pursuant to Senate Interim Rule 213.28 by order of the President of the Senate in conformance with presession filing rules, indicating neither advocacy nor opposition on the part of the President.

historyActions.ActionText: Introduction and first reading. Referred to President's desk.
